author: Viggo Meesters
description: Open .xlsx workbooks as read-only value tables with sheet tabs, search, and row limits. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .xlsx workbooks as read-only value tables with sheet tabs, search, and row limits.
manifest.name: XLSX Viewer

name: XLSX Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Initial public release of XLSX Viewer. Read-only .xlsx workbook table view with sheet tabs, search, row numbers, column letters, and a 10,000-row render cap.
